title: saccharum coarctatum
intro: Saccharum coarctatum, also known as Indian sarsaparilla or vassourinha, is a plant species belonging to the family Poaceae. It is a climbing grass with medicinal properties, particularly used to treat various health conditions. The plant is rich in saponins, which have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, and is used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders. Saccharum coarctatum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tincture, and powder, which can be used to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.
